tfg.tooltip.surfer_variant.__comment__: For magenta, yellow, blue, red, and pink colors. You can make something up!
tfg.tooltip.nametag: §7Used on a Scribing Table along with an item to name it, or with black dye to name the tag.
tfg.tooltip.beehive: §7Needs to be filled with empty frames and surrounded by flowers to attract bees.
tfg.tooltip.obsolete.tree_tap: §4Obsolete§f: Replaced by the AFC TreeTap, you can craft it from this one by placing this in a crafting table!
tfg.tooltip.obsolete.fridge: §4Obsolete§f: Replaced by the TFG Refrigerator, you can craft it from this one by placing this in a crafting table!
tfg.tooltip.blaze_burner: §cSuperheat§r §7with Coke, Anthracite, or Flawless and Exquisite coal gems.
tfg.tooltip.machine.customize_interior: §7The interior is customizable! Check the multiblock preview in EMI.
tfg.tooltip.machine.customize_greenhouse: §7This multiblock's walls can use any valid §eIron Greenhouse§7 tier blocks. Check the multiblock preview in EMI.
tfg.tooltip.armor.nanomuscle_set: §7Wear the full set to be §eFully Insulated§7 from ambient temperatures.
tfg.tooltip.armor.quarktech_set: §7Wear the full set to be §eFully Insulated§7 from ambient temperatures.
tfg.tooltip.armor.space_suit_set: §7Wear the full set to be §eFully Insulated§7 from ambient temperatures.
tfg.tooltip.solar_panel.single: Produces §6128 FE/t§r (32 EU/t) on the §6moon§r during the §6day§r
tfg.tooltip.solar_panel.large_tier1: Massive structure producing from §61024 to 4096 EU/t§r on the §6moon§r during the §6day§r
tfg.tooltip.solar_panel.large_tier2: Massive structure producing from §64096 to 16384 EU/t§r on the §6moon§r during the §6day§r
tfg.tooltip.solar_panel.large_tier3: Massive structure producing from §616384 to 65536 EU/t§r on the §6moon§r during the §6day§r
tfg.tooltip.large_egg: §7Can only be incubated in a §oLarge Nest
tfg.tooltip.sniffer_wool: §7Harvested from the back of a Sniffer
tfg.tooltip.wraptor_wool: §7Harvested from the feathers of a Wraptor
tfg.tooltip.wearable.snorkel: Allows the wearer to breathe underwater for a limited amount of time (+15s)
tfg.tooltip.wearable.snowshoes.powder: Allows the wearer to walk on Powder Snow
tfg.tooltip.wearable.snowshoes.snow: Reduces movement slowdown on snow and similar blocks
tfg.tooltip.piglin_disguise: Disguise makes piglins neutral, allowing for easier trade. But be careful! Their patience is not unlimited...
tfg.tooltip.rope_ladders: Sneak + right-click to pick up the whole ladder at once.
tfg.tooltip.hotornot_hot_equipment: §7Provides protection from all §6hot§7 held items and fluids (chest) and pipes (boots).§r
tfg.tooltip.hotornot_cold_equipment: §7Provides protection from all §bcold§7 held items and fluids (chest) and pipes (boots).§r
tfg.tooltip.hotornot_floating_equipment: §7Prevents all §elighter-than-air§7 gases from lifting you up.§r
tfg.tooltip.vessel_warning: §cHeating an overfilled vessel will void any overflow and may ruin your alloying!§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.coil_energy_discount: Every coil after §6Cupronickel§r reduces energy usage by 10%.
tfg.tooltip.machine.coil_speed_discount: §6Cupronickel§r coils process 25% slower. Every coil after §3Kanthal§r increases processing speed by 50%.
tfg.tooltip.machine.bioreactor_2: §7Combines organic and inorganic ingredients to produce synthetic biological products.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.evaporation_tower_1: §7Not to be confused with the Distillation Tower§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.evaporation_tower_2: §7Gets rid of excess solvent to condense solutions.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.electric_greenhouse_: §7Grow crops all year round with electricity! The Electric Greenhouse can accept fertilizer to enhance growth or be looped with the Pisciculture Fishery for ultimate efficiency.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.cooling_tower_2: §7Cools the hot coolant by dissipitating excess heat to the atmosphere.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.hydroponics_facility: §7The upgraded form of the EGH! The Hydroponics Facility boosts greenhouse output chances and has no restrictions on being oxygenated.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.pisciculture_fishery: §7Pisciculture Fisheries are not only a source of fresh fish but also vital in boosting greenhouse production through §3Aquaponics.§7 The structure can be filled with any fluid tagged as §o#tfg:pisciculture_fishery_fluids§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.high_temp_precision_: §7Grows Monocrystalline Silicon Boules and more, in a clean way that won't upset your Cleanroom!§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.gas_well_1: §7Extract Natural Gas from the ground with fracking!§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.gas_well_2: §7Accepts Explosives and either Steam or Water as input. Only works for Natural Gas veins.§r
tfg.tooltip.ore_prospector_count: This prospector will display ore counts.
tfg.tooltip.ore_prospector_xray: This prospector will display a %s x-ray view of ore blocks.
tfg.tooltip.dna_syringe.dirty2: §7Be careful not to poke anyone with this...§r
tfg.tooltip.dna_syringe.explain: Right-click on a mob to obtain a DNA sample. Place in a crafting grid to clear contents.
tfg.tooltip.lab_equipment.set: §7Does not contain a 5000mB round bottom flask.
tfg.tooltip.lab_equipment.set_dirty: §7Soon you might discover penicillin if you dont clean this...
tfg.tooltip.growth_chamber: This machine can run more recipes at once by increasing the number of layers.
tfg.tooltip.wireless_card_1: Enables wireless connections from any range, even from different planets!
tfg.tooltip.wireless_card_2: Items can still be transferred through the terminal, but at a very high power cost.
tfg.tooltip.wireless_card_3: Use a §dRailgun§r for your interplanetary logistical needs instead.
tfg.tooltip.component.nuclear_turbine_2: Each Rotor Holder above §5EV§r §7adds§r 10% efficiency and multiplies EU/t by 2.
tfg.tooltip.component.smr_generator_2:
Dedicated to produce power from sCO2 and the Small Modular Reactor.
 Use Lubricant and Booster to increase its efficiency and manage the cooling loop of the SMR.
tfg.tooltip.machine.fission_reactor_mk1_: §7Customizable Fission Reactor, add better components, process rods and materials into it and watch out for its temperature.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.smt_2: §7Requires a lubricant to run and can increase power output by using a booster.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.smt_3: §7Only accept§r SMT Input Hatch §7to input fluids.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.small_fission_reacto: §7The power of the atom but smaller§r
§7Can only process§r Americium 241 Rod§7 with§r TiCl₄-Doped Supercritical CO₂
tfg.tooltip.machine.heat_battery_2: §7Increase its temperature by inputting hot fluids and use the heat to boil other fluids or run recipes in the OLA.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.heat_battery_3: §7To transfer Heat to a Ostrum Linear Accelerator, make both§r Heat Port§7 and§r Heat Input Hatch§7 face each other.§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.smr_fluid_import_hat: §7Can only be used in a Small Modular Turbine§r
tfg.tooltip.machine.pastoral_engine_2: §7Automatically milks and shears any animals within the multiblock's bounding box.§r
tfg.tooltip.component.blue_ice: Can be placed inside a Fission Reactor to increase the maximum heat by §90.5§r
tfg.tooltip.component.aes_insulation_fra: Can be placed inside a Fission Reactor to increase the maximum heat by §91§r
tfg.tooltip.component.glacian_fur: Can be placed inside a Fission Reactor to increase the maximum heat by §92§r
tfg.tooltip.component.impure_moderate_co: Can be placed inside a Fission Reactor to increase the maximum heat by §95§r
tfg.tooltip.component.moderate_core_fram: Can be placed inside a Fission Reactor to increase the maximum heat by §910§r
tfg.tooltip.component.dry_ice: Can be used as an input in the Fission Reactor to cool it down, requires a Material Holder
tfg.tooltip.component.refrigerant_pellet: Can be used as an input in the Fission Reactor to cool it down, requires a Material Holder
tfg.tooltip.component.sandy_copper_frame: Can be placed inside a Heat Battery to increase its storage ability
tfg.tooltip.component.sandy_beryllium_fr: Can be placed inside a Heat Battery to increase its storage ability
tfg.tooltip.recipe_condition.animal_pres: Requires any TFC animal ready to produce
Requires a dairy animal ready to be milked
tfg.tooltip.firmalife_greenhouse.oxygen_: §7An oxygenated environment is required to function as a greenhouse in space.
tfg.tooltip.grow_light_disapointment: §7No. This will not increase your crop growth speed...
tfg.tooltip.rotten_voiding_cover: §7The Rotten Voiding Cover works just like an Item Voiding Cover but only targets and destroys §cRotten Items.
tfg.tooltip.crop.flooded: §c�§r This crop needs to be §nflooded§r to grow!
tfg.tooltip.crop.stick: §c�§r This crop needs a §nstick§r to grow!
tfg.tooltip.crop.grape_trellis: §c�§r This crop needs a §ngrape trellis§r to grow!
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.thirst_modifier_in: The total thirst loss percent when exhaustion tick occurs.
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.saturation_info: The amount of saturation the player has.Saturation determines how fast the players food level decreases.
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.passive_healing_in:
The amount of HP passively regenerated per second.
(%s§cHP§r/s)
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.exhaustion_info: The exhaustion level passively accumulated per second.The higher the value, the faster the player loses hunger/saturation.
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.intoxication_info: Time in minutes the player has been intoxicated.Intoxication occurs when drinking alcohol and affects the player's ability to type in chat.
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.exhaustion_multipl: Multiplies base value of exhaustion sources.(Activities like sprinting, jumping, etc.)
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.fruit_info: Fruit nutrition will primarily be sourced from fruit trees and berry bushes that grow in seasonal patterns.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r → §bDecrease Thirst Usage by 25%§r  ›§n§f85%§r → §bGain a 30% Mining Speed Buff§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.vegetables_info: Vegetable nutrition is commonly obtained from eating harvested crops.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r → §bRemoves Underwater Mining Penalty§r  ›§n§f85%§r → §bGain Respiration§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.protein_info: Protein nutrition is mostly obtained from eating meat. Some crops also provide protein.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r → §bDecrease Exhaustion Multiplier by 25%§r  ›§n§f85%§r → §bCarry an Additional Huge/Heavy Item without becoming overburdened§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.dairy_info: Dairy nutrition can come from drinking milk or eating dairy products like cheese.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r → §bGain Feather Falling I§r  ›§n§f85%§r → §bGain Feather Falling IV§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.grain_info: Grain nutrition is provided by eating processed cereal crops like wheat, rice, barley, etc.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r → §bGain a 5% Speed Buff§r  ›§n§f85%§r → §bGain a 15% Speed Buff§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.toxins_info: Toxin contamination is gained through consuming certain dangerous food items.§8§oDecreases by 3% each day§r§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f0%§r → §nOn any new increase§r → §c25% Chance to Gain a Random Hazardous Effect For 10s§r  ›§n§f99%§r → §cDeath§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.parasites_info: Parasite contamination increases by consuming specific raw meats or drinking muddy water.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f10%§r → §c20% Chance to Increase Parasites by 10% Each day to a Max of 60%§r  ›§n§f33%§r → §cIncrease Passive Exhaustion by 25%§r  ›§n§f66%§r → §cIncrease Passive Exhaustion by 50%§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.microplastics_info: Microplastic contamination is derived by consuming food packaged in plastic.§8§oDecreases by 1% each day§r§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f33%§r → §cIncrease High-Temperature Thirst Decay Multiplier by 25%§r  ›§n§f55%§r ↓      ◘ §cIncrease High-Temperature Thirst Decay Multiplier by 50%§r     ◘ §nOn any new increase§r → §c5% Chance to Get Cancer§r
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.negative_info: Contaminants are special nutrition types that can be transfered into meals the same as regular nutritients. However, contaminants are dangerous and will pose harm to your character unless treated.
tfg.tooltip.nutrition.positive_info: The average of all nutrition values determines your maximum HP. With a minimum of §f2§c❤§7 and a maximum of §f30§c❤§7.§f§lEffects:§r  ›§n§f55%§r ↓      ◘ §bGain a 50% Passive Health Regeneration Buff§r     ◘ §bDecrease Medical Condition Progression Rate by 25%§r     ◘ §bGain a 50% Medical Condition Passive Healing Buff§r  ›§n§f85%§r ↓      ◘ §bGain a 100% Passive Health Regeneration Buff§r     ◘ §bDecrease Medical Condition Progression Rate by 50%§r     ◘ §bGain a 100% Medical Condition Passive Healing Rate Buff§r
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_rubble.obtain: Dropped when breaking asphalt road blocks.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_rubble.usage: Can be recycled into Asphalt Mixture.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_road.marking: Use a spray can and stencil to paint markings.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_road.solvent: Use solvent spray to clear markings.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_mix.pouring: Use %s mB on base course to pour.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_mix.patch: Sneak-use %s mB on base course to patch.
tfg.tooltip.asphalt_road_stencil.usage: Use with a spray can in either hand.
tooltip.tfgc.chameleon_spray_can.control: §7• §fPress Keybind or Shift Right-Click §7- Open Color Radial Selection Menu
tooltip.tfgc.chameleon_spray_can.feature: §7• §fMass Painting §7- Hold §eShift§7 while painting blocks to
§7chain-paint connected surfaces of the same type.
§aEnjoys a %1$d%% fluid discount during bulk operations.
